title: Arabidopsis ovirensis
taxonomy: Arabidopsis ovirensis is classified as a species within the family Brassicaceae. This plant belongs to the genus Arabidopsis. Arabidopsis ovirensis is a close relative of the model organism Arabidopsis thaliana. It is native to the Mediterranean region and is considered a wild relative of cultivated Brassica species. Arabidopsis ovirensis is used in research to study the evolution of plant traits and adaptation to changing environments.
